homeInfo.title: Audio Quality Evaluation
homeInfo.message:
Welcome to this audio quality evaluation test.

You will listen to 11 audio samples and answer 2 questions about each one.
Please use headphones and ensure you are in a quiet environment.

For each question, rate the audio on a scale from 1 (worst) to 7 (best).

Click the button below when you are ready to begin.

questions.name: Sample 1
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: solo acoustic nylon string guitar playing in a fingerstyle Brazilian bossa nova style.

prompts.0: How correct is the information in the caption with relation to the audio? Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, incorrect information) to 7 (best, accurate information)
prompts.1: Does this description contain information that is unrelated to the audio clip? Rate on a scale from 1 (entire caption completely unrelated to the audio clip) to 7 (completely related)

questions.name: Sample 2
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental track blends Latin and electronic influences into an upbeat, infectious groove perfect for dancing. A groovy bassline drives the rhythm while lively percussion and a catchy synth melody create an energetic party atmosphere. The sound successfully fuses techno and house elements to produce a unique, danceable experience.

prompts.0: How correct is the information in the caption with relation to the audio? Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, incorrect information) to 7 (best, accurate information)
prompts.1: Does this description contain information that is unrelated to the audio clip? Rate on a scale from 1 (entire caption completely unrelated to the audio clip) to 7 (completely related)

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This piece is a beautiful example of instrumental music, featuring a gentle piano that creates a peaceful and introspective mood. The slow tempo allows the listener to focus on the soothing melodies and harmonies without any vocals.

questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This recording captures the serene sounds of a river flowing in Tainan County, creating an immersive and tranquil atmosphere. The gentle stream noises are complemented by subtle digital textures, blending organic nature with soft electronic tones. It serves as an ideal soundtrack for relaxation or meditation, highlighting the quiet beauty of the landscape through field recording techniques.

Prominent synthesizers, drum machines, and a synth bassline combine to produce a futuristic sound with a nostalgic, space-like atmosphere. A unique sound effect further enhances the piece's distinctive character, making it ideal for dance or rave settings.

questions.name: About You
questions.description: Please tell us about your musical background.

fields.label: How many years of musical experience do you have?
Please describe your musical experience (instruments played, training, listening habits, etc.)
fields.placeholder: e.g. I've played piano for 10 years and studied music theory in college...
